concerns.detail: Contains real names of individuals likely to be students or private individuals (haoran, yuan'mei'y) and potentially sensitive context about an intern, involving specific private communications regarding admissions.
concerns.excerpt: 我不是上面那个发照片的intern, 但是我找到了haoran之前给我发的, jitendra告知Admission Committee用gmail的事情... 我看不惯haoran被这么诬陷... 但是yuan'mei'y

concerns.detail: Deletion removes substantive reputation-related observation about an advisor, specifically that domestic faculty have actively advised PhD applicants against accepting offers from this advisor in multiple years.
concerns.excerpt: （今年phd选offer就有国内的faculty 劝退）（去年也有）（了解的人都在劝退）
